nodes.label: Track C — the cheap global direction (third lever)
nodes.rationale: The menu of ways to inject a global coordinating signal cheaply and forward-ish, under the hard rule: never rewrite the SCFF stream (P2.5); most already in the repo, try only after Track A/B.

nodes.label: Feedback Alignment / DFA (global error, no backward chain)
nodes.rationale: Fixed random feedback weights replace the transposed backward pass; DFA sends output error directly to every layer via its own random matrix — no weight transport, no chain; but supervised (needs output error) and doesn't scale to hard/conv tasks.

nodes.label: Top-down broadcast (C2, the coordination-window upgrade)
nodes.rationale: The natural upgrade to the w=2 coordination window if the window proves too short; also exactly the north-star's top-down loop — building it is forward progress toward the recurrent brain, not a detour.

nodes.label: Forward Target Propagation (C3) — verified and ruled out
nodes.rationale: An earlier dossier flagged FTP as 'likely flow-safe, verify' — verified, and it is NOT: target-prop's core move drives activations to targets, the forbidden stream-rewrite by construction; kept only as conceptual proof forward-only global credit is achievable.

nodes.label: Three-factor / e-prop / dopamine-STDP (the biology match)
nodes.rationale: Local pre*post eligibility trace (a leaky cap, already have it) gated by one global reward/error scalar — the author's 'half-local, half-global, dopamine' intuition verbatim; the theoretical home of the whole constraint envelope, unifying the Track-B gate and Track-C's global scalar as one object.
